message:
feat(stdlib): Implement curses.ascii and wsgiref submodules properly

- curses/ascii.zig: Full ASCII character classification (isalnum, isascii,
  iscntrl, isprint, etc.) and control character constants (NUL, BEL, ESC, etc.)
- wsgiref/validate.zig: WSGI validation functions (check_status, check_headers,
  check_environ, check_content_type)
- wsgiref/simple_server.zig: Re-exports from parent + make_server factory
- wsgiref/handlers.zig: BaseHandler, SimpleHandler, CGI handlers, read_environ

These were stub files with incorrect 'Not needed' comments that actually have
proper implementations in their parent modules or can be implemented directly.
